title: lappa officinalis subsp. nemorosa
intro: Lappa officinalis subsp. nemorosa, also known as wood betony, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Wood betony can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
